typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	QueryReadFromPoolStockInv as string (),
	QueryReadFromProductCount as string (),
	QueryReadFromRecPurchsOrder as string (),
	QueryReadfromSourceAG as string (),
	QueryReadFromStockReqstion as string (),
	QueryReadFromWorkOrder as string (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	ParentPackageExecutionID as integer ()
}

source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		TransactionType as string,
		CreatedDate as timestamp,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp,
		CompletedDate as timestamp,
		DeleteDate as timestamp,
		JournalDate as timestamp,
		RequiredDate as timestamp,
		FilledDate as timestamp,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		UnitCost as integer,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		RecordNumber as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromPoolStockInv',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadFromPoolStockInventory	source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		TransactionType as string,
		CreatedDate as timestamp,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp,
		CompletedDate as timestamp,
		DeleteDate as timestamp,
		JournalDate as timestamp,
		RequiredDate as timestamp,
		FilledDate as timestamp,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		UnitCost as integer,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		RecordNumber as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromProductCount',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadFromProductCount	source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		TransactionType as string,
		CreatedDate as timestamp,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp,
		CompletedDate as timestamp,
		DeleteDate as timestamp,
		JournalDate as timestamp,
		RequiredDate as timestamp,
		FilledDate as timestamp,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		UnitCost as integer,
		SupplierCode as string,
		IsReceivedForStock as boolean,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		RecordNumber as long,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		RemittoSupplierCode as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromRecPurchsOrder',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadFromRecPurchaseOrder	source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		TransactionType as string,
		CreatedDate as timestamp,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp,
		CompletedDate as timestamp,
		DeleteDate as timestamp,
		JournalDate as timestamp,
		RequiredDate as timestamp,
		FilledDate as timestamp,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		UnitCost as integer,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		RecordNumber as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromStockReqstion',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadfromStockReqstion	source(output(
		ProductId as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		TransactionType as string,
		CreatedDate as timestamp,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp,
		CompletedDate as timestamp,
		DeleteDate as timestamp,
		JournalDate as timestamp,
		RequiredDate as timestamp,
		FilledDate as timestamp,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		UnitCost as integer,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		RecordNumber as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromWorkOrder',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadFromWorkOrder	source(output(
		ManufacturerCode as string,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode as string,
		ProductSK as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT     ProductCode, Description, ProductTypeCategoryCode,  CAST(SourceSystemId AS smallint)SourceSystemId   ,ManufacturerCode FROM      dbo.Product',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LkpComSenseDWProductLKPTABLE	source(output(
		di_warehouse_id as integer,
		ds_division as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT     di_warehouse_id, ds_division FROM        dbo.prd_warehouse',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LkpWarehouseDivisionLKPTABLE	source(output(
		BCDivisionSK as long,
		ComsenseDivisionSK as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT BCDivisionSK = TargetSK 	,ComsenseDivisionSK = SourceSK FROM Stg.BCDimMappingVEL WHERE Shortcut Dimension Code = \'DIVISION\' 	AND SourceSK IS NOT NULL',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupBCDivisionSKLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProductCode as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		TransactionId as string,
		TransactionType as string,
		IsFifo as boolean,
		QuantityUsed as integer,
		QuantityRemaining as integer,
		ExtendedCostUsed as integer,
		ExtendedCostRemaining as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT ProductCode 	,WarehouseId 	,TransactionId 	,TransactionType 	,IsFifo = CAST(1 AS BIT) 	,QuantityUsed = SUM(QuantityUsed) 	,QuantityRemaining = SUM(QuantityRemaining) 	,ExtendedCostUsed = CAST(SUM(TotalCostUsed) as decimal(14,2)) 	,ExtendedCostRemaining = CAST(SUM(TotalCostRemaining) as decimal(14,2)) FROM ( 	SELECT PF.ProductCode 		,WarehouseId 		,QuantityUsed 		,QuantityRemaining 		,TotalCostUsed 		,TotalCostRemaining 		,TransactionId = CAST(COALESCE(ReceivingId, ProductCountId,  											PoolToStockId, - 1) AS VARCHAR(10))  							+ (CASE  									WHEN PurchaseOrderNumber <> \'\' 									THEN \':\' + PurchaseOrderNumber 									ELSE \'\' 								END) 		,TransactionType = CAST((CASE  										WHEN ReceivingId IS NOT NULL 											THEN \'Receiving-Purchase Order\' 										WHEN ProductCountId IS NOT NULL 											THEN \'Product Count\' 										WHEN PoolToStockId IS NOT NULL 											THEN \'Pool Stock\' 										ELSE \'Unknown\' 									END) AS VARCHAR(50)) 	FROM dbo.ProductFifo PF 	LEFT JOIN dbo.ProductWarehouse PW  	ON PW.ProductWarehouseId = PF.ProductWarehouseId 	) X GROUP BY ProductCode 	,WarehouseId 	,TransactionId 	,TransactionType',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupFifoLKPTABLE	source(output(
		di_product_id as integer,
		di_warehouse_id as integer,
		db_Stock as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT di_product_id 	,P.di_warehouse_id 	,db_Stock FROM dbo.prd_product_dtl P',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupWarehouseStockLKPTABLE
ReadFromPoolStockInventory derive() ~> ReadFromPoolStockInventoryErrorReformat
ReadFromProductCount derive() ~> ReadFromProductCountErrorReformat
ReadFromRecPurchaseOrder derive() ~> ReadFromRecPurchaseOrderErrorReformat
ReadfromStockReqstion derive() ~> ReadfromStockReqstionErrorReformat
ReadfromStockReqstion,ReadFromRecPurchaseOrder,ReadFromPoolStockInventory,ReadFromWorkOrder,ReadFromProductCount union(byName: true) ~> UnionAllTransactions
ReadFromWorkOrder derive() ~> ReadFromWorkOrderErrorReformat
ReadFromPoolStockInventoryErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadFromPoolStockInventory0
ReadFromProductCountErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadFromProductCount0
ReadFromRecPurchaseOrderErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadFromRecPurchaseOrder0
ReadfromStockReqstionErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadfromStockReqstion0
UnionAllTransactions derive(ProductId = ProductId) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
ReadFromPoolStockInventoryErrorReformat,ReadFromProductCountErrorReformat,ReadFromRecPurchaseOrderErrorReformat,ReadfromStockReqstionErrorReformat,ReadFromWorkOrderErrorReformat union(byName: true) ~> UnionAllReadErrors
ReadFromWorkOrderErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadFromWorkOrder0
ReadFromPoolStockInventory0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadFromPoolStockInventoryERROROUTPUTFILE
ReadFromProductCount0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadFromProductCountERROROUTPUTFILE
ReadFromRecPurchaseOrder0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadFromRecPurchaseOrderERROROUTPUTFILE
ReadfromStockReqstion0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadfromStockReqstionERROROUTPUTFILE
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError,LkpWarehouseDivisionLKPTABLE lookup(WarehouseId == di_warehouse_id,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LkpWarehouseDivision
ReadFromWorkOrder0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadFromWorkOrderERROROUTPUTFILE
LkpWarehouseDivision split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LkpWarehouseDivisionIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LkpWarehouseDivisionIsMatch@NotMatch select(mapColumn(
		DivisionCode = ds_division,
		ProductId = ProductId,
		WarehouseId = WarehouseId,
		TransactionHeaderID = TransactionHeaderID,
		TransactionDetailID = TransactionDetailID,
		TransactionStatus = TransactionStatus,
		TransactionType = TransactionType,
		CreatedDate = CreatedDate,
		ReleasedDate = ReleasedDate,
		CompletedDate = CompletedDate,
		DeleteDate = DeleteDate,
		JournalDate = JournalDate,
		RequiredDate = RequiredDate,
		FilledDate = FilledDate,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate = ConfirmedDeliveryDate,
		Quantity = Quantity,
		UnitCost = UnitCost,
		SupplierCode = SupplierCode,
		IsReceivedForStock = IsReceivedForStock,
		WarehouseLocationId = WarehouseLocationId,
		RecordNumber = RecordNumber,
		RemittoSupplierCode = RemittoSupplierCode
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LkpWarehouseDivisionREFORMAT
LkpWarehouseDivisionREFORMAT derive(SourceSystemId = $Project__SourceSystemId,
		DivisionSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + DivisionCode))) ~> DerivedSourceSystemId
DerivedSourceSystemId,LookupBCDivisionSKLKPTABLE lookup(DivisionSK == ComsenseDivisionSK,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupBCDivisionSK
LookupBCDivisionSK split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupBCDivisionSKIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupBCDivisionSKIsMatch@Match split(SourceSystemId == 10 && isNull(BCDivisionSK), disjoint: true) ~> FilterBSCOData@(Discard,PassThru)
FilterBSCOData@PassThru derive(ProductSK = $Project__SourceSystemId * 10000000000L + toLong(ProductId)) ~> DerivedProductSK
DerivedProductSK,LkpComSenseDWProductLKPTABLE lookup(DerivedProductSK@ProductSK == LkpComSenseDWProductLKPTABLE@ProductSK,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LkpComSenseDWProduct
LkpComSenseDWProduct select(mapColumn(
		ProductSK = DerivedProductSK@ProductSK,
		{} = {},
		BCDivisionSK = BCDivisionSK,
		SourceSystemId = SourceSystemId,
		DivisionSK = DivisionSK,
		DivisionCode = DivisionCode,
		ProductId = ProductId,
		WarehouseId = WarehouseId,
		TransactionHeaderID = TransactionHeaderID,
		TransactionDetailID = TransactionDetailID,
		TransactionStatus = TransactionStatus,
		TransactionType = TransactionType,
		CreatedDate = CreatedDate,
		ReleasedDate = ReleasedDate,
		CompletedDate = CompletedDate,
		DeleteDate = DeleteDate,
		JournalDate = JournalDate,
		RequiredDate = RequiredDate,
		FilledDate = FilledDate,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate = ConfirmedDeliveryDate,
		Quantity = Quantity,
		UnitCost = UnitCost,
		SupplierCode = SupplierCode,
		IsReceivedForStock = IsReceivedForStock,
		WarehouseLocationId = WarehouseLocationId,
		RecordNumber = RecordNumber,
		RemittoSupplierCode = RemittoSupplierCode,
		ManufacturerCode = ManufacturerCode,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode = ProductTypeCategoryCode
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LkpComSenseDWProductSelect
LkpComSenseDWProductSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LkpComSenseDWProductIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LkpComSenseDWProductIsMatch@Match,LookupWarehouseStockLKPTABLE lookup(ProductId == di_product_id && WarehouseId == di_warehouse_id,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupWarehouseStock
LookupWarehouseStock split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupWarehouseStockIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupWarehouseStockIsMatch@NotMatch select(mapColumn(
		IsWarehouseStockItem = db_Stock,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode = ProductTypeCategoryCode,
		ManufacturerCode = ManufacturerCode,
		ProductSK = ProductSK,
		{} = {},
		BCDivisionSK = BCDivisionSK,
		SourceSystemId = SourceSystemId,
		DivisionSK = DivisionSK,
		DivisionCode = DivisionCode,
		ProductId = ProductId,
		WarehouseId = WarehouseId,
		TransactionHeaderID = TransactionHeaderID,
		TransactionDetailID = TransactionDetailID,
		TransactionStatus = TransactionStatus,
		TransactionType = TransactionType,
		CreatedDate = CreatedDate,
		ReleasedDate = ReleasedDate,
		CompletedDate = CompletedDate,
		DeleteDate = DeleteDate,
		JournalDate = JournalDate,
		RequiredDate = RequiredDate,
		FilledDate = FilledDate,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate = ConfirmedDeliveryDate,
		Quantity = Quantity,
		UnitCost = UnitCost,
		SupplierCode = SupplierCode,
		IsReceivedForStock = IsReceivedForStock,
		WarehouseLocationId = WarehouseLocationId,
		RecordNumber = RecordNumber,
		RemittoSupplierCode = RemittoSupplierCode
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupWarehouseStockREFORMAT
LookupWarehouseStockREFORMAT,LookupFifoLKPTABLE lookup(LookupWarehouseStockREFORMAT@TransactionType == LookupFifoLKPTABLE@TransactionType && ProductId == ProductCode && LookupWarehouseStockREFORMAT@WarehouseId == LookupFifoLKPTABLE@WarehouseId && TransactionHeaderID == TransactionId,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupFifo
LookupFifo select(mapColumn(
		ProductCode = ProductCode,
		WarehouseId = LookupFifoLKPTABLE@WarehouseId,
		TransactionId = TransactionId,
		TransactionType = LookupFifoLKPTABLE@TransactionType,
		IsFifo = IsFifo,
		QuantityUsed = QuantityUsed,
		QuantityRemaining = QuantityRemaining,
		ExtendedCostUsed = ExtendedCostUsed,
		ExtendedCostRemaining = ExtendedCostRemaining,
		IsWarehouseStockItem = IsWarehouseStockItem,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode = ProductTypeCategoryCode,
		ManufacturerCode = ManufacturerCode,
		ProductSK = ProductSK,
		{} = {},
		BCDivisionSK = BCDivisionSK,
		SourceSystemId = SourceSystemId,
		DivisionSK = DivisionSK,
		DivisionCode = DivisionCode,
		ProductId = ProductId,
		TransactionHeaderID = TransactionHeaderID,
		TransactionDetailID = TransactionDetailID,
		TransactionStatus = TransactionStatus,
		CreatedDate = CreatedDate,
		ReleasedDate = ReleasedDate,
		CompletedDate = CompletedDate,
		DeleteDate = DeleteDate,
		JournalDate = JournalDate,
		RequiredDate = RequiredDate,
		FilledDate = FilledDate,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate = ConfirmedDeliveryDate,
		Quantity = Quantity,
		UnitCost = UnitCost,
		SupplierCode = SupplierCode,
		IsReceivedForStock = IsReceivedForStock,
		WarehouseLocationId = WarehouseLocationId,
		RecordNumber = RecordNumber,
		RemittoSupplierCode = RemittoSupplierCode
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupFifoSelect
LookupFifoSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupFifoIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupFifoIsMatch@Match derive(ETLCreateDate = $System__StartTime,
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID,
		ExtendedCost = toInteger((UnitCost * Quantity)),
		TransactionDate = iifNull(JournalDate,$System__StartTime),
		IsReceivedForStock = iifNull(IsReceivedForStock,1),
		ProductTypeCategoryCode = iifNull(ProductTypeCategoryCode,'Unknown'),
		ManufacturerCode = iifNull(ManufacturerCode,'UNK'),
		ExtendedCostUsed = iif(toInteger(RecordNumber) > 1, 0, iifNull(ExtendedCostUsed,0)),
		IsWarehouseStockItem = iifNull(IsWarehouseStockItem,0),
		DivisionCode = iifNull(DivisionCode,'-1'),
		IsFifo = iifNull(IsFifo,0),
		ExtendedCostRemaining = iif(toInteger(RecordNumber) > 1, 0, iifNull(ExtendedCostRemaining,0)),
		QuantityUsed = iif(toInteger(RecordNumber) > 1, 0, iifNull(QuantityUsed,0)),
		QuantityRemaining = iif(toInteger(RecordNumber) > 1, 0, iifNull(QuantityRemaining,0))) ~> DeriveAuditandOtherColumns
DeriveAuditandOtherColumns derive(ProductTypeCategorySK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + ProductTypeCategoryCode)),
		ManufacturerSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + ManufacturerCode)),
		WarehouseSK = $Project__SourceSystemId * 10000000000L + WarehouseId,
		SupplierSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + SupplierCode)),
		RemitToSupplierSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + RemittoSupplierCode))) ~> DerivedSKs
DerivedSKs sink(input(
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ExtendedCost as integer,
		TransactionType as string,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode as string,
		ManufacturerCode as string,
		TransactionStatus as integer,
		IsWarehouseStockItem as boolean,
		ProductId as integer,
		BCDivisionSK as long,
		DivisionCode as string,
		SourceSystemId as long,
		WarehouseSK as long,
		TransactionDetailID as string,
		FilledDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		SupplierSK as string,
		RemittoSupplierSK as string,
		TransactionHeaderID as string,
		DivisionSK as string,
		RequiredDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ManufacturerSK as string,
		JournalDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		IsReceivedForStock as boolean,
		SupplierCode as string,
		ExtendedCostUsed as integer,
		ProductSK as long,
		Quantity as integer,
		WarehouseId as integer,
		ProductTypeCategorySK as string,
		DeleteDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		CompletedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		UnitCost as integer,
		IsFifo as boolean,
		ExtendedCostRemaining as integer,
		ETLExecutionID as long,
		CreatedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		QuantityUsed as integer,
		WarehouseLocationId as integer,
		QuantityRemaining as integer,
		ReleasedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ETLCreateDate,
		ExtendedCost,
		TransactionType,
		ProductTypeCategoryCode,
		ManufacturerCode,
		TransactionStatus,
		IsWarehouseStockItem,
		ProductId,
		BCDivisionSK,
		DivisionCode,
		SourceSystemId,
		WarehouseSK,
		TransactionDetailID,
		FilledDate,
		ConfirmedDeliveryDate,
		SupplierSK,
		RemittoSupplierSK = RemitToSupplierSK,
		TransactionHeaderID,
		DivisionSK,
		RequiredDate,
		ManufacturerSK,
		JournalDate,
		IsReceivedForStock,
		SupplierCode,
		ExtendedCostUsed,
		ProductSK,
		Quantity,
		WarehouseId,
		ProductTypeCategorySK,
		DeleteDate,
		CompletedDate,
		UnitCost,
		IsFifo,
		ExtendedCostRemaining,
		ETLExecutionID,
		CreatedDate,
		QuantityUsed,
		WarehouseLocationId,
		QuantityRemaining,
		ReleasedDate)) ~> WritetoTarget
